thing-type.label: Peblar EV Charger
thing-type.description: Peblar EV Charger accessed via local REST API. Requires firmware 1.6 or newer and the API enabled in the charger web interface.

parameter.name: hostname
parameter.label: Hostname / IP Address
parameter.description: Hostname or IP address of the Peblar charger on the local network

parameter.name: apiToken
parameter.label: API Token
parameter.description: Authorization token for the local REST API (set in charger web interface)

parameter.name: refreshInterval
parameter.label: Refresh Interval
parameter.description: How often to poll the charger in seconds (default: 30)
